SELECT seriesOutliersDetectTukey(arrayJoin((SELECT value FROM time_series_data))) AS outlier_scores;
CREATE TABLE sample_data (id UInt32, value Float32);
SELECT id, seriesOutliersDetectTukey(arrayMap(x -> value, (SELECT value FROM sample_data))) AS outlier_scores FROM sample_data;
SELECT id, seriesOutliersDetectTukey(arrayMap(x -> value, (SELECT value FROM sample_data)), 0.2, 0.8, 1.5) AS outlier_scores FROM sample_data;
CREATE TABLE test_data (time DateTime, reading Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY time;

INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (now(), -3), (now() + interval 1 minute, 2), (now() + interval 2 minutes, 15), (now() + interval 3 minutes, 3), (now() + interval 4 minutes, 5), (now() + interval 5 minutes, 45), (now() + interval 10 minutes, 12);
SELECT seriesOutliersDetectTukey(arrayAgg(reading) ORDER BY time) AS outlier_scores FROM test_data;
SELECT seriesOutliersDetectTukey(arrayJoin((SELECT arrayAgg(value) FROM sample_data)), 0.1, 0.9, 2) AS outlier_scores;
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 100, 7, 8, 9, 10, 1])) AS series_data SELECT seriesOutliersDetectTukey(series_data, 0.05, 0.95, 1.5) AS outlier_scores;
